summary: Complete reverse-engineered project plan audit across both the VELYON – Legal Command Center workspace and the UK–Lanzarote Repatriation workspace. Documents every task, report, research deliverable, NotebookLM notebook, visual asset, technical infrastructure component, and conversation log artifact produced from project inception to 9 April 2026. Includes outstanding items and recommended next steps for both the legal proceedings and VELYON product development.
